title: Beyth #1029
definition:
Beth-shittah = "house of the acacia tree" or "place of the acacia"

 1) an unknown location, perhaps an acacia grove
nasbUsage:
Definition: Beth-shittah = "house of the acacia tree" or "place of the acacia"

 1) an unknown location, perhaps an acacia grove

    NASB:  place of the acacia, a place in Pal.
